title: helianthemum nummularium subsp. nummularium
intro: Helianthemum nummularium subsp. nummularium, also known as rockrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This low-growing shrub has medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of rockrose include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Rockrose can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be confirmed through further research and medical supervision.
